codeReview.summary: The structured diff API is close, but the comparison can report a clean match for incomplete or malformed fixture sets. In particular, missing fixture files are silently ignored, and full-row comparisons do not fail on row-count-only mismatches after PK deduplication.

issues.description: compare_snapshot() silently skips any expected fixture file that is missing (`continue` on lines 584-585, repeated for full-row tables on 597-598). That means an incomplete or even empty fixtures directory can return `SnapshotDiff(is_identical=True, tables={...subset...})`, so the validator can falsely report success without checking all required snapshot tables. Missing fixtures should be surfaced as mismatches or errors.

_compare_full_rows() records `row_count_expected` and `row_count_actual` but only flips `is_match` when `added`, `removed`, or `modified` are non-empty. Because rows are keyed into dicts first, duplicate PK rows in a fixture/DB collapse before comparison; a row-count mismatch caused by duplicate keys would therefore be reported as a match even though the counts differ. If row counts are part of the structured diff contract, `row_count_expected != row_count_actual` should also fail the table comparison.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Target: AGENTS.md and .factory/skills/db-pipeline-worker/SKILL.md. Shared guidance says the production-dump rebuild fixture is reusable across tests via conftest, but the repo still relies on a bespoke `ensure_database` fixture in `test/test_snapshot.py`. Either the shared fixture needs to be centralized, or the guidance should be updated so workers do not assume cross-file fixture reuse is already available.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission AGENTS.md:87-97 says `test/test_ingest_f006.py::rebuild_database` is shared via conftest imports; db-pipeline-worker/SKILL.md:48 says to reuse that fixture; test/test_snapshot.py:80-85 documents a local `ensure_database` workaround because the rebuild fixture is not actually imported there.

summary: Reviewed feature `snapshot-comparison-utils` at commit `b12e4867e677dfedd750a91b23c543ca76242592`. The implementation adds useful structured diff objects and focused regression tests, but it should not pass scrutiny yet because missing fixture files are silently ignored, allowing incomplete fixture directories to be reported as identical.
